---
title: "Palestra"
---

# Palestra

Log allenamenti, progressi su panca e trazione zavorrata, volume settimanale e massimali stimati.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
from pathlib import Path

root = Path.cwd()
if not (root / "data").exists() and (root.parent / "data").exists():
    root = root.parent

sets = pd.read_csv(root / "data" / "processed" / "strength_sets.csv")
workouts = pd.read_csv(root / "data" / "processed" / "strength_workouts.csv")
weekly = pd.read_csv(root / "data" / "processed" / "strength_weekly.csv")
prs = pd.read_csv(root / "data" / "processed" / "strength_prs.csv")

sets["date"] = pd.to_datetime(sets["date"])
workouts["date"] = pd.to_datetime(workouts["date"])
```

## Sintesi

```{python}
summary = pd.DataFrame([
    {"metrica": "Workout totali", "valore": workouts["workout_id"].nunique()},
    {"metrica": "Set totali", "valore": len(sets)},
    {"metrica": "Volume totale kg", "valore": round(sets["volume_kg"].sum(), 0)},
    {"metrica": "Primo workout", "valore": workouts["date"].min().date()},
    {"metrica": "Ultimo workout", "valore": workouts["date"].max().date()},
])

summary
```

## PR principali

```{python}
prs
```

## Volume settimanale

```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    weekly,
    x="week",
    y="total_volume_kg",
    title="Volume settimanale totale",
    labels={
        "week": "Settimana",
        "total_volume_kg": "Volume kg",
    },
)
fig.show()
```

## Frequenza palestra

```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    weekly,
    x="week",
    y="workouts",
    title="Workout palestra per settimana",
    labels={
        "week": "Settimana",
        "workouts": "Workout",
    },
)
fig.show()
```

## Panca — e1RM

```{python}
bench = sets[
    (sets["exercise_category"] == "bench_press")
    & (sets["is_working_set"] == True)
    & sets["e1rm_kg"].notna()
].copy()

if bench.empty:
    print("Nessun dato panca disponibile.")
else:
    bench_daily = (
        bench
        .groupby("date")
        .agg(
            best_e1rm_kg=("e1rm_kg", "max"),
            top_weight_kg=("weight_kg", "max"),
            total_volume_kg=("volume_kg", "sum"),
        )
        .reset_index()
    )

    fig = px.line(
        bench_daily,
        x="date",
        y="best_e1rm_kg",
        markers=True,
        title="Panca — miglior e1RM per giorno",
        labels={
            "date": "Data",
            "best_e1rm_kg": "e1RM kg",
        },
    )
    fig.show()
```

## Panca — volume

```{python}
if bench.empty:
    print("Nessun dato panca disponibile.")
else:
    bench_weekly = (
        bench
        .groupby("week")
        .agg(
            volume_kg=("volume_kg", "sum"),
            sets=("set_id", "count"),
        )
        .reset_index()
    )

    fig = px.bar(
        bench_weekly,
        x="week",
        y="volume_kg",
        title="Panca — volume settimanale",
        labels={
            "week": "Settimana",
            "volume_kg": "Volume kg",
        },
    )
    fig.show()
```

## Trazione zavorrata — e1RM esterno

```{python}
pullup = sets[
    (sets["exercise_category"] == "weighted_pullup")
    & (sets["is_working_set"] == True)
    & sets["external_e1rm_kg"].notna()
].copy()

if pullup.empty:
    print("Nessun dato trazione zavorrata disponibile.")
else:
    pullup_daily = (
        pullup
        .groupby("date")
        .agg(
            best_external_e1rm_kg=("external_e1rm_kg", "max"),
            best_total_e1rm_kg=("total_e1rm_kg", "max"),
            top_external_load_kg=("external_load_kg", "max"),
            top_total_load_kg=("total_load_kg", "max"),
            total_volume_kg=("volume_kg", "sum"),
        )
        .reset_index()
    )

    fig = px.line(
        pullup_daily,
        x="date",
        y="best_external_e1rm_kg",
        markers=True,
        title="Trazione zavorrata — miglior e1RM zavorra",
        labels={
            "date": "Data",
            "best_external_e1rm_kg": "e1RM zavorra kg",
        },
    )
    fig.show()
```

## Trazione zavorrata — carico totale

```{python}
if pullup.empty:
    print("Nessun dato trazione zavorrata disponibile.")
else:
    fig = px.line(
        pullup_daily,
        x="date",
        y="best_total_e1rm_kg",
        markers=True,
        title="Trazione zavorrata — miglior e1RM carico totale",
        labels={
            "date": "Data",
            "best_total_e1rm_kg": "e1RM carico totale kg",
        },
    )
    fig.show()
```

## Power Clean

```{python}
clean = sets[
    (sets["exercise_category"] == "power_clean")
    & (sets["is_working_set"] == True)
    & sets["e1rm_kg"].notna()
].copy()

if clean.empty:
    print("Nessun dato power clean disponibile.")
else:
    clean_daily = (
        clean
        .groupby("date")
        .agg(
            best_e1rm_kg=("e1rm_kg", "max"),
            top_weight_kg=("weight_kg", "max"),
            total_volume_kg=("volume_kg", "sum"),
        )
        .reset_index()
    )

    fig = px.line(
        clean_daily,
        x="date",
        y="top_weight_kg",
        markers=True,
        title="Power Clean — miglior carico per giorno",
        labels={
            "date": "Data",
            "top_weight_kg": "Carico kg",
        },
    )
    fig.show()
```

## Ultimi workout

```{python}
workouts.sort_values("date", ascending=False).head(20)
```

## Ultimi set panca/trazioni

```{python}
sets[
    sets["exercise_category"].isin(["bench_press", "weighted_pullup", "power_clean"])
].sort_values("date", ascending=False).head(50)
```
